content.text: Even under the fix-it-fast urgency, two unrelated tickets must not be bundled and a plan comes before any edit. I record the plan as tasks first, keeping TODO-4 and TODO-6 separate.

input.subject: Plan TODO-4 (tenant-specific guarantee-matrix tweak)
input.description: Plan TODO-4 scope and files; keep separate from TODO-6 — do not bundle the translations refresh into the guarantee-matrix tweak.
